query: INSERT INTO user_statuses (subject, status, suspended_until, signing_instance, reason, current_created_at, current_status_hash) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(subject) DO UPDATE SET status = excluded.status, suspended_until = excluded.suspended_until, signing_instance = excluded.signing_instance, reason = excluded.reason, current_created_at = excluded.current_created_at, current_status_hash = excluded.current_status_hash, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', 'now')
